name: civicgo
description: Root scripts for running the CivicGO frontend and backend.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.restore: dotnet restore backend/CivicGo.Api.csproj && npm --prefix frontend install
